{{Quote|I am Jedi before I am Nikto.|Ausar Auset|<ref name="SOS" />}}
'''Ausar Auset''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|He is one with the Force, Master Hett.|K'Kruhk, on Auset's death|<ref name="Republic 74">[[Republic 74|''Republic'' 74]]</ref>}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]], Ausar Auset was discovered by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] at an early age; leading him to think of himself as a Jedi first and a Nikto second. Studying the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] as well as his native culture, Auset constructed a blue-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] before passing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. At some point during his studies, Auset became acquainted with the famed Jedi hero [[Sharad Hett]] and the two had mutual respect between each other.<ref name="SOS" />

Attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], Jedi Auset dutifully reported to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] at the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]; a deadly conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Master Auset took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and led his [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. As the war neared its end, Master Auset was one of many Masters fighting on the front lines during the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]]. Master Auset was forced to fight against the [[Morgukai Shadow Army]], an army of cloned Nikto warriors; though his Jedi sense of detachment allowed him to do so effectively. During the battle, Auset formed a strong camaraderie with fellow Master [[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett]], and stood in battle with him while Master [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]] guided events through [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]]. During the fighting, Master Auset was caught in an explosion from enemy fire, and was killed instantly while his compatriots looked on helplessly.<ref name="SOS" />

===Legacy===
While there was no time to recover Auset's body, the explosion that took the Nikto Jedi's life exposed underground tunnels that would eventually contribute to the Republic's victory against the Separatists on the planet. During a break in the fighting, at the [[Funeral of Oppo Rancisis|pyre]] of Master Rancisis, the surviving Jedi spoke the names of their fallen brethren whose bodies could not be recovered. Along with Jedi [[Durnar]], [[Xeltek]], and [[T'Bolton]], Master Auset's name was uttered over the burning corpse of the [[Thisspiasian/Legends|Thisspiasian]] Master.<ref name="SOS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ostrander speculated that Auset was born in [[75 BBY]] on [[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]].<ref name="jfo">{{JCFCite|url=posts/21973967|board=Literature|thread=Getting to know the EU Jedi (John, Jan, Davide, Randy--feel free to help!)|user=[[John Ostrander|jfostrander]]|date=2005-10-17|time=8:43 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20180622020335/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/getting-to-know-the-eu-jedi-john-jan-davide-randy-feel-free-to-help.21960714}}</ref>
